purpose: Generic runtime regressions for mandatory folk-behavior reconstruction before evidence review.

required: detect procrastination as a folk behavior grouping handle before evaluating the intervention evidence
remove procrastination as a unitary outcome identity
preserve only explicitly supplied initiation delay completion deadline reporting and task-condition measurements
emit separate relations for the exact recorded behavior and the broader folk construct
reject construct-level efficacy unless independent construct unity and ecological transport close
forbidden: treat randomized assignment as validation of procrastination as one target
infer a standard behavior bundle from the familiar label
rewrite a protocol-bound measurement contrast as reduced real-world procrastination
let effect magnitude repair construct identity

fixtures.condition: A decisive controlled intervention changes one directly measured initiation or completion relation under stated conditions while the source names the result with a broader folk behavior label.
required: permit causal admission for the exact independently measured relation when its full burden closes
retain the folk label as grouping_handle_only
reject transfer from the exact relation to treatment of the unitary folk construct
state the tested operational and ecological scope
forbidden: reject the exact decisive relation merely because the source used a folk label
allow the exact relation to validate the broader construct
